$description: Platform implementation deltas for "Playground Sign-in". Generated by scripts/build-handoff.mjs.

deltas.android: Jetpack Navigation Compose; equivalent back stack
resources / Compose theme from the same token values

deltas.ios: Custom on-screen circular keypad (no system keyboard)
deltas.android: Custom on-screen circular keypad (no system keyboard)

deltas.ios: App-level inactivity timer (~30s on hub) → lock overlay; reset on touch
deltas.android: Equivalent inactivity timer → lock overlay; reset on touch

deltas.ios: Async image load (educator photos / room thumbnails) with initials/letter fallback
deltas.android: Coil/async load with the same fallback

deltas.ios: iPad landscape uses a hero/form split + centred return screen
iOS 17+ assumed — iOS 16 support is an OPEN question (~2,000 field devices below 17)
